name: Snappy Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the sausage in oil until it is slightly browned.
2. Add the green onions and cook for 1 minute longer.
3. Add the liquid from the green beans, thyme, salt, and parsley.
4. Cook until the sausage is very tender.
5. Add the green beans and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
6. If fresh green beans are desired, boil them until they are tender.
7. Use the water from the boiled beans to prepare as for canned beans.
